EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads at the first attempt stage when they have previously provided a renewal date when the scheme is unknown.
EmailTemplate.name: Renewal Date Lead (General)_1st Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Requested insurance quote
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
You previously provided your insurance renewal date, so that I could provide you with an insurance quote.
I haven’t yet been able to speak with you to provide your business insurance quote over the phone. Is there a good time for me to try you again?
Here at Kingsbridge we offer a complete package of cover that is designed specifically for UK businesses.
Why buy with Kingsbridge?
- Real people, real support: quick access to dedicated UK-based insurance specialists. - UK-based claims centre: rapid, responsive claims processing managed by an in-house claims team. - There when you need them: strong history of fair, fast, and hassle-free claims processing. - Tailored industry expertise: cover specifically built for contractors, freelancers, and small - business owners. - No hidden fees: transparent pricing with no unexpected costs.
So, I can discuss with you which parts of the policy would be relevant for your business, it would be great to speak over the phone. When would be a good time for me to reach you?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
You can also get a quote online via our website www.kingsbridge.co.uk.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
